ddls:
CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who incurred the expense */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the expense */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the expense */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of the expense */,
  "start_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting location of the expense */,
  "end_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending location of the expense */,
  "miles" REAL /* Number of miles driven for the expense */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the expense */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the expense */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate to base currency */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor or service provider */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount of the expense */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the expense including tax */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_start_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_end_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the employee joined the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "budget_limit" REAL /* Budget limit for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the manager belongs to */,
  "reports_to" INTEGER /* ID of the higher-level manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_reports_to FOREIGN KEY ("reports_to") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval */,
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense being approved */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager approving the expense */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was approved or rejected */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the approval */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments by the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approvals_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approvals_expense_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_id") REFERENCES expenses ("expense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receipts" (
  "receipt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receipt */,
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense the receipt belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the receipt */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the receipt in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the receipt was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the uploaded file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receipt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receipts_expense_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_id") REFERENCES expenses ("expense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who generated the report */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the report */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the report */,
  "total_expenses" REAL /* Total expenses for the report */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the total expenses */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expense_reports_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user at the time of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)
